description.overview: The Parson Russell is slightly larger and more square than the Jack Russell, bred to the original breed standard.
description.temperament: PRTs are bold, athletic, and clever. They're friendly but independent and need confident handling.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to eye problems and deafness.
description.exercise: Extremely high energy. Need extensive daily exercise and activities.

verdict.summary: Athletic, bold terriers with endless energy. Parson Russells are clever and tenacious - perfect for active, experienced terrier enthusiasts.
